chunks.title: HTML Entities

chunks.title: HTML Entities

chunks.text: so this and lt semicolon will look like a weird thing

chunks.title: HTML Entities

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: it starts with ampersand symbol and ends with semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: but when I save and run it, I have a less than b display on the screen

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: similarly if I make any paragraph tag in my html document

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: and I want to write my college but there is a lot of space between my college and my college

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so html never allows me so many multiple spaces

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: as soon as I save it, VS code will automatically remove all these spaces and will bring a single space in between

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: if you have not installed any pretier in VS code

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: even if your space is not being removed, you can write as many spaces as you want

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: whenever I refresh this page, I will have only a single space print

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: because html never considers more than one space

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: but as soon as I write something with this space

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: nbsp and I am starting this with ampersand and ending it with semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: and when I save and run it, I have a lot of space in between

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: now if I start writing this multiple times

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so if I have written multiple things like this

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so nothing is being printed here but a lot of spaces are in between

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so all these things that are not directly in html

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: like less than symbol print, greater than symbol print, multiple spaces print

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: to do all these things in html, we use something called html entities

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: to read html entities, there are some properties which are important to understand

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: first of all, what is html entity?

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: html entity is a piece of text, a string

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: which starts with ampersand

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: this & symbol that we see on our keyboard, we call it ampersand symbol

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so any entity will start with ampersand and end with semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: like for space, and this is the entity which we use the most in html

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: the entity used for space is nbsp

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: which starts with ampersand and ends with semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: what is the meaning of nbsp?

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: nbsp means non-breaking space

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so wherever I start with & and end with semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: this will become an html entity for me

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: and html will treat it like an entity

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: and what is written inside this, tells us what this entity does

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: for example, for less than sign, I write &lt

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: similarly, if I want greater than sign, I will write &gt greater than semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so like this, I have many entities

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: and these entities start with ampersand and end with semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: the second property is that these are used to display a reserved character

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: like in html, because all my tags start with less than symbol and end with greater than symbol

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so these are reserved or special characters in html

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: in html, & is also a special character

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: ampersand is also a special character

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: because all my html entities start with this

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so all the reserved characters, which html code will consider as something else

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: to display them, we use our html entities

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: and to display those invisible characters, we use html entities which are not in html

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: like if I want to print non-breaking space

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: space is not a character, it is an invisible character

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: but because more than one space is not allowed in html

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so if we want more space, I have to use my entity

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: third property of entities is that we can use them in the place of characters which are difficult to type

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: like there are some characters which we can't print with our keyboard

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: like one example of this is that I want to print a heart on my screen

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: I remove all these codes and simply write h1

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: in this heading, I want to print heart

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: now to print heart, there is no symbol on normal keyboard

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so how can I print heart on my screen

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so for such special symbols like heart, cloud, sun, light, arrows

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: there are many symbols which are not on our keyboard

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so to print these, we use entities

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: for hearts, I will write ampersand

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: after that I will write hearts and then semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so in this way, I will have an entity in which only heart is being printed

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: normally, if you want to print heart on screen without html entity

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: then we don't have any other way

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: because it is a special character which is not available on keyboard

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so from here, we get third property of html entities

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: fourth thing about html entities is that browser interprets them

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: means the html entity you have written, the browser will interpret it according to its own

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: chrome will interpret it according to its own

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: some other browser will interpret it according to its own

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: then it will output the character you have desired

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: and this output is called character render

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: some commonly used entities which are used for reserved words are

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: to print ampersand, I use ampersand, amp, and then my semicolon

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: so this is interpreted as my and symbol

chunks.title: HTML Entities

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: if I want to print greater than, I will use gt

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: and if I want to print quotes, I will use quote

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: all these are my entity names

chunks.title: HTML Entities
chunks.text: means whatever I write in between, this amp is my entity name, lt is my entity name, quot is also my entity name
